query:
INSERT INTO custom_roles (tenant_company_id, name, description, base_role, permissions, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
  (2, 'Read Only', 'Can view all CRM data but cannot create, edit, or delete any records. Ideal for executives, auditors, or observers.', 'user', '["contacts.read","companies.read","deals.read","activities.read","reports.read","analytics.read"]', 1, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
  (2, 'Sales Only', 'Full access to contacts, deals, and activities. No access to billing, admin settings, or team management. Ideal for sales reps.', 'user', '["contacts.read","contacts.write","companies.read","companies.write","deals.read","deals.write","activities.read","activities.write","tasks.read","tasks.write","email.send"]', 1, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
  (2, 'Billing Admin', 'Access to invoices, payments, accounts receivable, and financial reports. No access to sales pipeline or marketing. Ideal for accounting staff.', 'user', '["billing.read","billing.write","invoices.read","invoices.write","payments.read","payments.write","reports.read","contacts.read","companies.read"]', 1, 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
